overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a futuristic desert city. The camera follows a car from a third-person perspective as it navigates through commercial streets, past construction sites, and around rocky hills, eventually looping back to the starting area. The environment features cyberpunk architecture with palm trees, digital billboards, and unfinished overpass structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with green storefront and overpass ruins ahead

agents.ego_description: driving straight through commercial street following a beige sedan

notable_agents.action: walking along the sidewalk near the palm trees

entered.detail: two-story commercial building with teal green facade and yellow signage
tall palm trees lining the right sidewalk
unfinished concrete overpass structure with multiple support columns
tall street lamps with distinctive orange poles

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives straight along a sunlit commercial street. A green two-story shop building stands on the left while palm trees line the right sidewalk. In the distance, the ruins of an unfinished concrete overpass dominate the skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: active construction zone with high-rise development

events.description: vehicle makes a smooth right turn at the intersection
police car with roof lights passes by on the right side

agents.ego_description: executing a right turn at the intersection and accelerating past the construction zone

notable_agents.action: police car driving in the opposite direction passing the ego vehicle

entered.detail: active construction area with scaffolding and building materials
large yellow construction cranes towering over the building site
multi-story building under construction with exposed concrete framework

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns right at the intersection, revealing a massive construction site on the right. Yellow cranes tower over an unfinished high-rise building. A police car passes by in the opposite direction as the overpass ruins shift to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved highway skirting red rock desert hills

events.description: vehicle turns right at the next intersection entering residential zone

agents.ego_description: navigating a curved road along the rocky terrain before turning right at the intersection

entered.detail: large red rock formations and desert hills lining the left side of the road
overhead highway sign structure spanning the road

segments.scene_description: The road curves through an arid landscape with red rocky hills on the left. The construction site falls behind as the vehicle approaches and executes another right turn at an intersection, leaving the highway sign overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential transition area with distant city views

agents.ego_description: cruising straight through a residential area with scattered pedestrians on sidewalks

notable_agents.action: walking along the sidewalk near the residential houses

entered.detail: small single-story houses with fenced yards
tall futuristic skyscrapers visible on the horizon
large amusement park ferris wheel structure

segments.scene_description: Driving through a residential neighborhood with small houses on the left. The distant city skyline with towering skyscrapers becomes visible ahead, and a large ferris wheel appears on the left side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial strip with digital advertising and gas station

agents.ego_description: driving straight through commercial district passing various storefronts and billboards

entered.detail: large vertical digital screen displaying advertisements with purple and blue graphics
commercial building with circular signage and canopy

segments.scene_description: The vehicle proceeds through a commercial strip featuring prominent digital billboards and a gas station on the right. The ferris wheel grows larger on the left as the residential area gives way to shops and advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial building with patriotic graffiti mural

events.description: vehicle executes a left turn at the intersection returning toward the starting area

agents.ego_description: slowing down and making a left turn at the intersection, returning toward the green shop building

notable_agents.action: crossing the street at the intersection

entered.detail: large industrial building with American flag mural and 66th STREET graffiti
the same green commercial building from the start now visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes a large industrial building covered in patriotic graffiti and street art. After turning left at the intersection, the green shop building from the beginning comes back into view ahead, completing the loop through the city district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic desert city, beginning on a sunlit commercial street and looping back to the starting point. It begins by driving past a green two-story shop and palm trees toward the ruins of an unfinished concrete overpass, before turning right to reveal a massive construction site with towering yellow cranes. As the road curves away from the construction and through an arid landscape of red rocky hills, the scene shifts into a residential neighborhood where a distant skyline of skyscrapers and a large ferris wheel emerge. The environment then transitions into a commercial strip filled with digital billboards and a gas station, passing an industrial building covered in patriotic graffiti. Finally, the vehicle turns left at an intersection to bring the original green shop building back into view, completing the circuit through the district.
